## [03:01 - 04:51]

And then last but not least is your Facebook management checklist. This is everything you need to really be running a successful Facebook account from a high level and also from a day to day level. So this is your initial strategy. So before you get going, just kind of thinking about who are the other players in the industry following all of them.
